case_title: EMMETT TIMOTHY KENNEDY III ET AL VS. MARCELLAS LASAGNERIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY III, EMMETT TIMOTHY KENNEDY, CRYSTAL R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LASAGNERIA, MARCELLAS DI SCIULLO, MASSIMO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,657.32 FILED BY KENNEDY III, EMMETT TIMOTHY KENNEDY, CRYSTAL R. AS TO DEFENDANT LASAGNERIA, MARCELLAS DI SCIULLO, MASSIMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DI SCIULLO, MASSIMO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LASAGNERIA, MARCELLAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF EMMETT TIMOTHY DENNEDY III IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CRYSTAL KENNEDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCELLAS LASAGNERIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GIANFRANCO DI SCIULLO. DEFENDANT MASSIMO DISCIULLO IS PRESENT. WITNESSES FOR THE DEFENSE SHANNON NEWTON, EDWIN MCGARY AND ANTHONY PASSANISI, PRIVATE INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2021 - JUDGMENT.
